bindings.quest_action: uncover the truth behind a land dispute
bindings.quest_focus: the contested field between two families
bindings.quest_stakes: the settlement tearing itself apart from within
bindings.quest_threat: an ancient grudge escalating into violence
bindings.quest_origin: a boundary dispute that ignited old resentments

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need an outsider's ear. Things in {location} have gotten ugly, and everyone here is too tangled up to see straight.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Two of our oldest families are at each other's throats. It started over {quest_focus}: who rightfully owns it. But now {target_npc} is threatening to burn the other family's storehouse, and accusations of sabotage are flying both ways. The guard tried to intervene but both sides accused them of taking the other's part. Someone neutral needs to {quest_action} before {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'm not asking you to pick a side. I'm asking you to find the facts before someone gets killed.

playerResponses.text: I'll look into it. But both sides need to agree to accept what I find.
Settling feuds isn't my trade, but I'll see what I can do.
Family grudges are quicksand. I'm staying out of this.

bindings.quest_action: scout the real threat so the leaders stop arguing
bindings.quest_focus: the defense strategy for the settlement
bindings.quest_stakes: the settlement being left defenseless while its leaders fight
bindings.quest_threat: an external enemy exploiting internal division
bindings.quest_origin: a disagreement between the guard captain and the village elder

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. The walls have ears in {location} these days.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Our guard captain and the village elder have turned on each other. The captain wants to fortify {location} and conscript farmers into militia service. The elder says that will destroy the harvest and starve everyone. {target_npc} tried to broker a compromise and got shouted down by both. Meanwhile, {enemy_type} have been spotted {location_hint} and nobody can agree on how to respond. We need someone to {quest_action}, not fury.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we don't figure this out soon, the {enemy_type} won't need to attack. We'll tear ourselves apart first.

playerResponses.text: I'll scout the threat and bring back a clear report. That should end the argument.
Political squabbles and monster threats? I'll handle the monsters. You handle the politics.
I don't get between leaders fighting for power. Good luck.

bindings.quest_action: track down the merchant who arranged the deal
bindings.quest_focus: a disputed trade shipment claimed by both families
bindings.quest_stakes: a grudge that simmers for years with no resolution
bindings.quest_threat: two families holding the settlement hostage over a vague contract

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, do you see those two groups glaring at each other across the square? That's been every day for the past two weeks.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A shipment of {quest_item} arrived from a neighboring settlement: enough to see us through the season. But the delivery was split between two families who both claim the full amount was promised to them. {target_npc} has the original trade agreement but it's vague enough that both sides think they're right. Now the {quest_item} is locked in the storehouse and nobody gets any until this is resolved. I need someone to {quest_action}: last seen heading {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring back the merchant, or at least their ledger. Without proof, {quest_stakes}.

playerResponses.text: I'll find the merchant and settle this once and for all.
Chasing down merchants to settle a squabble? Fine, but you owe me.
Sort out your own supply disputes. I'm passing through.

bindings.quest_action: recover the hidden supplies and prove the family's innocence
bindings.quest_focus: falsely accused family stores moved for safekeeping
bindings.quest_stakes: a family's reputation being destroyed by a false accusation
bindings.quest_threat: a brother's betrayal poisoning the entire community
bindings.quest_origin: supplies secretly moved to protect them from raiders

dialogueChunks.intro: I hate to burden a stranger with our troubles, {player_name}, but I'm at the end of my rope.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: My own brother has turned half the settlement against us. He claims our family stole {quest_item} from the communal stores, and now people I've known my whole life won't look me in the eye. The truth is, those supplies were moved to a safer location {location_hint} after we heard rumors about {enemy_type} raiding. {target_npc} helped us move them, but now they're too frightened to speak up. If you could {quest_action}, it would prove we never stole a thing.
dialogueChunks.outro: My family's name is all we have. Please help me clear it.

playerResponses.text: If the supplies are where you say they are, I'll bring them back and set the record straight.
Family drama and missing supplies. Not my usual work, but I'll look into it.
Family feuds run too deep for an outsider to fix. I'm sorry.
